overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game, walking through neon-lit urban streets at night. The camera moves from an outdoor dining area past trash-filled corners onto a main commercial street lined with holographic billboards, finally turning into a narrow alleyway. The atmosphere features heavy use of pink and cyan neon lighting against dark wet pavement.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a wide commercial street lined with towering buildings covered in neon billboards. Concrete barriers line the left side while the camera walks toward a distant traffic light and holographic advertisements.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a narrow covered alley dominated by a bright pink neon sign reading 24. The space features vending machines and hanging paper lanterns, creating an intimate enclosed atmosphere distinct from the open street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim outdoor dining area through a gritty urban corridor and into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by gliding past plastic tables and concrete pillars bathed in purple light, moving toward the distant glow of a ramen shop sign. As the camera turns a corner, the environment shifts into a cramped space cluttered with trash bags and utility structures before the view opens up onto a wide main street. The scene then expands to reveal towering buildings draped in holographic billboards and neon advertisements, with the camera advancing past concrete barriers toward a distant traffic light. Finally, the perspective turns away from the open road into a narrow covered alley, where the atmosphere becomes intimate and enclosed under the bright pink glow of a neon sign and hanging paper lanterns.
